message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="marty-cagan" color="blue" summary="Approved — third confirmation for Step 8">
Already approved. My consensus was given during the initial review and re-confirmed after Scott's renames. The a11y fixes don't change product scope or user experience — they're accessibility improvements I fully support.

CONSENSUS: Approved (Marty). This is my third confirmation — count me as a yes.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Counted, Marty. 9/9 confirmed.

**To the entire team**: All 9 approvals are locked in. Please do not send further confirmations -- everyone is counted. The sole blocker is the GPG signing agent. I will commit and push the moment the project owner restores it. No action needed from anyone until then.
